channel.title: Fremont Abbey Open Mic
channel.description: Upcoming events for Fremont Abbey Open Mic

item.title: Fremont Abbey Open Mic
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: 4272 Fremont Ave N, Seattle

All art forms welcome at this community arts space. Twice-monthly open mic on the 1st and 3rd Tuesdays.

Event details
